title: v6.7 frontier: review provenance audit
description: Add review-provenance-audit as a safe_read verifier that fails when implementation-grade work claims Guardian/Council review without resolvable maker/checker/council provenance. Acceptance: negative fixture with self-attested review provenance fails; unit tests pass; command is registered with help metadata. Stop condition: audit command + fixtures + tests only; do not integrate into release-state-audit until TASK-075. QIF boundary: audit pass is structural/runtime evidence of review provenance, not proof that the review was semantically correct.
triage_notes: Implemented review-provenance-audit safe_read verifier with command registry/help metadata, CLI reference, schema, self-hosting Council review provenance, and pass/fail regression tests. Verification: review-provenance-audit pass, targeted runtime tests pass, command-registry-refresh pass.
